questionHtml:
Dinitrogen monoxide, N2O, causes depletion of ozone in the stratosphere.

Different sources of N2O have different ratios of 14N:15N.

State one analytical technique that could be used to determine the ratio of 14N:15N.

meta.title: State one analytical technique that could be used to determine the ratio of 14N:15N.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 3.2—Functional groups: Classification of organic compounds

Structure 3.2.8—Mass spectrometry (MS) of organic compounds can cause fragmentation of molecules. Deduce information about the structural features of a compound from specific MS fragmentation patterns.
